question: We attacked a monster and reduced it to 0 HP. Then we applied retaliate damage to the attacker. Did we play this correctly?
A character played the top action of one card and the bottom action of another card on the same turn. Did we play this correctly?
A monster was reduced to 0 HP, but we still applied the poison condition from the same attack afterwards. Did we play this correctly?
During setup, we placed monsters and map tiles according to the scenario book before the first round started. Did we play this correctly?
We let a summoned figure act immediately in the same round it was summoned. Did we play this correctly?
A monster with Shield 1 was attacked for 4 damage, so we reduced the damage to 3. Did we play this correctly?
We allowed a character to recover all discarded cards during a long rest and heal 2 hit points. Did we play this correctly?
A monster focused on the closest enemy first, using initiative as a tie-breaker. Did we play this correctly?
We gave experience points to a character every time they killed a monster, even though the ability card did not grant experience. Did we play this correctly?
At the end of a scenario, we looted all remaining money tokens automatically. Did we play this correctly?
A ranged attack was made against an adjacent enemy, and we applied disadvantage to the attack. Did we play this correctly?
We allowed a character to choose any two ability cards from their hand at the start of the round. Did we play this correctly?
When a character became exhausted, we kept their summon on the board. Did we play this correctly?
We spawned all monsters as elites regardless of the scenario setup instructions. Did we play this correctly?
After completing the scenario objective, we ended the scenario successfully according to the scenario's success condition. Did we play this correctly?
